# Pull Request

## Type of Change

- [ ] New package
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature addition
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Package Name

If this PR relates to a specific package: ___________

## Description

Clear description of what this PR does.

## Checklist

### For New Packages

- [ ] Package follows directory structure in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] README.md with feature overview
- [ ] QUICKSTART.md with installation instructions
- [ ] marketplace.json with complete metadata
- [ ] LICENSE file included
- [ ] Tests included (if applicable)
- [ ] Added to marketplace-index.json
- [ ] Installation instructions tested
- [ ] MCP server tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Plugin tested (if applicable)

### For All PRs

- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines
- [ ] I have tested my changes
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] My changes don't break existing packages

## Testing

How have you tested these changes?

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or GIFs demonstrating the changes.

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)
